summary_en: FY3/26 final dividend raised to ¥20.00/share from ¥12.50/share (increase of ¥7.50). Payout ratio target raised from 30% to 40–50%. Strong business performance and enhanced shareholder return policy cited. Effective for shareholders of record as of 31 March 2026.
title_en: Revision of Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase) for Fiscal Year Ending March 2026
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, m-up Holdings announced a revision to its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2026. The company's board resolved to increase the final dividend per share from the previously forecast ¥12.50 to ¥20.00, an increase of ¥7.50 per share. This revision reflects solid business performance and a strategic decision to enhance shareholder returns. Concurrently, the company raised its target payout ratio from 30% to a range of 40–50%, signalling a commitment to more substantial and sustained capital distribution while maintaining a strengthened financial foundation for future business development. The dividend is payable to shareholders of record as of 31 March 2026.
